title: HONG GEN DIH IN, TANGLAI THU

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Tang thupha hong genta in, a kimu ngeilo na;
Jesuh le a vanglian pi, Amah in na
dingin;
Tangthu teltak hong gen in, naupangte hilh bangin;
Hong hilh in ka gimzo hi, ka khial gawp
khinta hi.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Tua tangthu hong genta in, tua tangthu hong genta in;
Tua tangthu
hong genta in, Jesuh le hong itna

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Tua tangthu damtak gen in, ka theih baih
nadingin;
A mah in hong tatkhiatna, mawh kiphel nadingin;
Tua tangthu hong genkik in, ka mangngilh
theih loh na’ng;
Daitui bang zingsang om hang, sun ciangin mang thei hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Tua
tangthu mah hong gen in, nuamna aw tawh gen in;
Mawhna pan hong phelna ding, Jesuh hong gup phawk
ning;
Tua tangthu gen laitakin, gimna khat hong tun leh;
Hehnepna hong pia ding ci’n,
tu’n tangthu genta in

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Tua tangthu mah hong gen in, limtak kiciantakin;
Leitung
minthannate in, hong suksiat gawp khak ding;
Hih leitung minthannate, ka lunggulh lua thei
hi;
Jesuh’n hong damsaknate, nong gen phapha ding hi.
